steps.title: Identify the sentence's subject
steps.content: Despite the multiple names appearing early, the subject is analysis (singular). The possessive construction “Legal scholars James Melton and Tom Ginsburg's” modifies analysis, which is the noun that determines verb agreement.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Identifies is the only choice that conjugates for singular agreement. The other options — have identified, are identifying, and identify — all use plural forms. That matches choice B — B is correct.
